scripts.build:wasm: npm run build:wasm:fsharp && npm run build:wasm:signature
scripts.build:wasm:fsharp: cd fsharp && tree-sitter build --wasm && move tree-sitter-fsharp.wasm ..\wasm\ 2>nul || mv tree-sitter-fsharp.wasm ../wasm/ 2>/dev/null || true
scripts.build:wasm:signature: cd fsharp_signature && tree-sitter build --wasm && move tree-sitter-fsharp_signature.wasm ..\wasm\ 2>nul || mv tree-sitter-fsharp_signature.wasm ../wasm/ 2>/dev/null || true
scripts.generate: for dir in fsharp fsharp_signature; do cd $dir; tree-sitter generate; cd -; done
